overall.description: Game engine footage showing a smooth drone camera movement around the Arc de Triomphe in Paris. The camera glides along the monument's stone facade with detailed classical sculptures, then pulls back to reveal the empty plaza and surrounding Haussmann-style buildings under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of triumphal monument with sculptural reliefs

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding along the monument wall at low altitude, examining the detailed stone sculptures and architectural carvings

entered.detail: close-up view of the beige stone wall with intricate classical sculptures and reliefs
detailed stone carving of human figures on the monument pillar
decorative horizontal stone molding along the top of the monument base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves smoothly along the base of the Arc de Triomphe, showcasing the detailed stone sculptures and architectural elements of the historic monument. The scene is devoid of people, with bright sunlight casting sharp shadows on the carved reliefs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza surrounding the triumphal monument

events.description: camera pulls back from the monument wall revealing the full arch structure and the expansive open plaza
stone bollards and distant buildings come into view as the camera moves deeper into the plaza

agents.ego_description: pulling back from the monument to reveal the full arch and traversing the empty plaza toward the surrounding cityscape

entered.detail: wide expanse of patterned stone paving tiles covering the ground
row of classic Parisian Haussmann-style apartment buildings lining the horizon
line of green trees marking the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the close-up monument wall to a wide view of the Place de l'Étoile plaza. The full Arc de Triomphe becomes visible on the right while the camera moves across the empty paved expanse toward the distant tree-lined avenues and historic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with stone bollards and radiating avenues

events.description: camera passes between the large stone bollards marking the plaza edge

agents.ego_description: continuing across the plaza toward the stone bollards and the tree-lined avenues beyond

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone pillars topped with spherical ornaments marking the plaza boundary
cream-colored stone apartment buildings with traditional Parisian architecture and mansard roofs
mature green trees lining the avenue leading away from the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves across the open plaza, passing the distinctive stone bollards with spherical tops. The Arc de Triomphe fades from view as the camera approaches the tree-lined avenues and the surrounding historic Parisian buildings under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate look at the Arc de Triomphe's architecture before expanding into a wide vista of the surrounding Parisian plaza. It begins by gliding smoothly along the base of the monument, highlighting the detailed stone sculptures and sharp shadows cast by the bright sunlight. As the camera pulls away from the carved reliefs, the view opens up to reveal the vast, empty paved expanse of the Place de l'Étoile with the full monument now positioned to the right. The scene then shifts across the open plaza, passing distinctive stone bollards with spherical tops as the camera moves further from the arch. Finally, the monument fades from view as the movement carries the camera toward the distant tree-lined avenues and historic buildings under a bright midday sun.
